sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16493" key="a)/sterktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄστερκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16493.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀστεργής</ref></xr>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄστεκτος.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
